content: Big-bang UI rewrites: feature-freeze the old screen for the rewrite duration, commonly run 2x time / 3x budget estimates, deliver zero value until full cutover, and carry all-or-nothing cutover risk (one regression reverts everything). Strangler-fig / incremental alternative: keep old screen live behind a facade/flag, migrate one capability at a time, use feature flags to instantly revert a single migrated slice without touching the rest - limits blast radius of any one regression to the slice being migrated.
